name: Orbital Valentine
description: A gravitational love letter generator where hearts orbit, collide, and birth new celestial bodies in a cosmic dance of attraction and color.
prompt: February 22, 2026 falls just after Valentine's season, so I'm creating a cosmic gravity simulator where hearts and celestial bodies attract each other. You click to spawn hearts that orbit and merge, creating increasingly complex and beautiful gravitational systems with trailing paths that paint the canvas like a love letter written in starlight.
